checklist.detail: Only 4 of 5 required tests present; TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip'd (plan req #5 unmet); TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA omits plan-required Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true assertions; TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported) instead of TierGeneric as plan mandates; TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks missing grade A/B/C/D/F assertion.

checklist.detail: No test deletion or hard-coded expected values found. However TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses supported 'go' instead of TierGeneric, avoiding the actual injection scenario; t.Skip on AggregateSkipsUnsupported is honest but leaves requirement untested.
checklist.label: No test-gaming / faking

checklist.detail: Test-only changes; no production code modified. But partial/inaccurate tests (wrong language, missing assertions) risk false confidence; 20% of plan requirements entirely unimplemented (t.Skip).
checklist.label: Safe to advance

dimensions.evidence: Only 4 of 5 required tests present; TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip'd (plan req #5 unmet); TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA omits plan-required Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true assertions; TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported) instead of TierGeneric as plan mandates; TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks missing grade A/B/C/D/F assertion.
Only scorer_test.go modified as plan specified; no production files touched. Minor deduction for t.Skip stub adding noise without value.

No test deletion or hard-coded expected values found. However TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses supported 'go' instead of TierGeneric, avoiding the actual injection scenario; t.Skip on AggregateSkipsUnsupported is honest but leaves requirement untested.
Test-only changes; no production code modified. But partial/inaccurate tests (wrong language, missing assertions) risk false confidence; 20% of plan requirements entirely unimplemented (t.Skip).

failureReasons: TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip'd — plan requirement #5 entirely unimplemented
TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA missing plan-required Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true assertions
TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported language) instead of TierGeneric unit as plan explicitly requires
TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored relies on TierGeneric nil-return shortcut rather than specifically testing the complexity≤5 branch as plan intends
